'''Tony Pope''' ([[March 22]], [[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[February 11]], [[2004]])<ref name="Memorial" /> was a [[Wikipedia:Voice acting|voice artist]] who voiced many characters for [[The Walt Disney Company]] including voicing [[Wikipedia:Goofy|Goofy]] for eleven years.<ref name="variety">{{WebCite|url=https://variety.com/2004/scene/people-news/tony-pope-1117900197/amp/|text=Tony Pope: Voiceover artist|archivedate=20221102170513}}</ref>

Pope provided additional voices for the [[1993]] ''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault]]'' video game.<ref name="Rebel Assault" /> Later Pope voiced [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and an [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[1998]] [[Star Wars Trilogy Arcade]] coin-operated video game.<ref name="Arcade">''[[Star Wars Trilogy Arcade]]''</ref> In [[1997]], Pope lent their voice to portray [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] in the ''[[A New Hope Read-Along]]'' book and cassette tape. The audio of which was later used in the [[2015]] ''[[A New Hope Read-Along Storybook and CD]]''.<ref name="ANH">''[[A New Hope Read-Along]]''</ref>
